message:
feat(e2e): Add semantic search tests and expand SSH sources test coverage

New Semantic Search E2E Tests (e2e_semantic_search.rs):
- Test vector index build with hash embedder (always available)
- Test semantic search mode (vector-only results)
- Test hybrid search mode (combined lexical + semantic)
- Test HNSW approximate nearest neighbor search
- Test fallback behavior when semantic unavailable
- Add session fixture helpers for Claude Code and Codex formats

SSH Sources E2E Expansions (e2e_ssh_sources.rs):
- Add ssh_sources_setup_dry_run test for non-interactive dry-run mode
- Add ssh_sources_sync_single_host test for basic sync workflow
- Add ssh_sources_sync_with_filters test for path filtering
- Add ssh_sources_incremental_sync test for delta sync behavior
- Add ssh_sources_error_recovery test for connection failure handling
- Add write_test_log helper for debugging test output
- Fix Clippy lints: use let-chains pattern, remove redundant format!()
- Fix assertion to use !entries.is_empty() instead of >= 1

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
